body:
APPROVE
Both integration points are wired exactly as specified. Pre-commit hook is glob-scoped to DESIGN.md and degrades gracefully when bun is absent; CI runs the same command unconditionally in the ci job after installing root deps. Implementation matches the plan with no gold-plating.
